subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God, though ye be distant by countless leagues and far removed, yet in heart and soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حضرت یزدان هر چند بابدان هزاران فرسنگ دورید و مهجور ولی بدل و جان
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @firmness in the Covenant
